nodeIdMap.literal: "SELECT *,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_MANAGER_CLOSING_MONTH,'-',''))), #(lf)LEFT(CAST(MONTH_DATE AS DATE),4)+LEFT(RIGHT(CAST(MONTH_DATE AS DATE),5),2)) AS AGENT_KEY#(lf)#(lf)FROM dbo.V_ARR_ADDS"
